name: Rhubarb Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend together the sugar, flour, and nutmeg.
2. Beat the eggs into the dry mixture.
3. Add the sliced rhubarb to the batter.
4. Line a 9-inch pie plate with the pastry dough and fill it with the rhubarb mixture.
5. Dot the top of the filling with butter.
6. Place the lattice crust on top of the pie.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 60 minutes, or until set.
8. Allow to cool before serving.
